_comment: IAEDU account pool for synthetic-text generation.
Each account has its own channel_id (visible in the IAEDU portal URL when
you open a chat). Copy this file to configs/iaedu_accounts.json and
fill in real values. The configs/iaedu_accounts.json file is gitignored.
default_endpoint applies to every account that does not override it.
agent_id cmamvd3n40000c801qeacoad2 is the gpt-4o agent used in the AP
project; change if your portal points elsewhere.
